root.sql: select sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type , sc_lon_m_int_step_rate.loan_interest_rate * 100 as loan_interest_rate , sc_cls_confirm_data.membership_no , sc_cls_confirm_data.data_refno , sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance , sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date , sysdate , sc_mem_m_ucf_groupmajor.member_group_major , sc_mem_m_ucf_groupmajor.group_major_name from sc_lon_m_rule , sc_lon_m_int_step_rate , sc_cls_confirm_data , sc_mem_m_ucf_groupmajor , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group , sc_mem_m_membership_registered where sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = sc_lon_m_int_step_rate.loan_type and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_cls_confirm_data.membership_no and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no and sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_major = sc_mem_m_ucf_groupmajor.member_group_major and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_status_code = '0' and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.mem_type = '01' and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'LON' and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance > '0' and sc_lon_m_rule.invest_status = '0' and sc_lon_m_int_step_rate.loan_interest_rate <> '0' /*WHERE*/
